# Mint — Copilot instructions (repo-wide)

Follow:
- AGENTS.md
- rules.md
- SOT.md
- tools/openapi/mint.openapi.yaml
- visions/vision_features.md

Must:
- Keep changes minimal and testable.
- Add unit tests for financial calculations.
- Update OpenAPI + SOT.md when a public contract changes.
- No money movement features (read-only).
- No secrets in repo.
